notes: Iter 26: re-run of iter 25's exact constraints AFTER fixing the override-panel CASH-drop bug. Iter 25's stored config_json (and the production config it seeded) silently dropped CASH from override panels; signal_override_engine.get_target_allocation_for_override renormalized the resulting 31-99 percent panels to 1.0 at runtime. Net effect: R*_protection_w_cash_raw and R*_upside_w_cash_raw were sampled by Optuna but had ZERO effect on the score. With the panel-sum invariant in place and ensure_regime_signal_overrides now preserving extra ticker keys, those raw weights actually move the executed allocation. Champion may shift; iter 25's 0.88 score is no longer apples-to-apples.
